title: Ore Overhaul
description: A mod that adds new unique vanilla style ores to the game
body:
###  OreOverhaul expands Minecraft's underground and natural world with new materials and mechanics that tie directly into vanilla gameplay.

Features:
- Jade Ore – A new gem-based ore with unique uses.
- Jade Detector – Detect Diamond ores near you and can be crafted with jade
- Copper Battery – Charges up the Jade Detector
- Cryo Shards – Throwable items that slow everything in an area.
- Sulfur – A new material, which can be used for smelting and crafting gunpowder.
-  Sulfur explodes when near fire or lava, so be carefull bringing it out of the nether
- Iron Roots – A special plant that grows when coal humus is thrown near it. The plant absorbs the humus and drops iron in return.
- Coal Humus – A crafted item used to activate iron roots.
- Jade Tools – A bit Better than Diamond but worse than Netherite
- Jade Armor – A bit Better than Diamond but worse than Netherite, unique design
  
and more to come ...
